text:
is the 6th ending theme of the Attack on Titan anime, composed and performed by .

It replaced Name of Love in Episode 60 and was replaced by Akuma no Ko in Episode 76.

Complete version

 

 

Ending animation

The camera pans over a mountain range before arriving at Fort Slava, then suddenly switches to the underbelly of a crow, which a hand reaches towards. The hand is revealed to be belonging to Falco Grice, who lays on the ground and stares at the sky as signs of a battle are seen around him.

The camera repeats the same pan as before, but with multiple crows and a sketch drawing of a falcon taking flight from a branch overlaying it. The falcon continues to fly while images of the Battle of Fort Slava play in the background. Reiner Braun appears, looking off in the distance, while Gabi Braun solemnly looks down. As the battle continues to rage, Falco appears once again, looking straight into the camera as many birds fly behind him. He closes his eyes and disappears as a flaming bird resembling a phoenix flies across the screen, bursting into a bright light.

Many abstract forms of light and sparks dance in a black void, before forming a massive tree of light emitting more sparks as a mysterious figure stands before it. A hand, belonging to an unknown person, takes hold of one of these sparks and clenches it in its fist.

Falco reaches out to the sky once more and a crow flies into the clouds.
